00028 namespace sprite
00029 {
00030   namespace mpl = boost::mpl;
00031   namespace tr1 = std::tr1;
00032 
00033   using boost::disable_if;
00034   using boost::disable_if_c;
00035   using boost::enable_if;
00036   using boost::enable_if_c;
00037   using boost::is_pointer;
00038   using boost::is_same;
00039   using boost::shared_ptr;
00040   using boost::static_visitor;
00041   using boost::dynamic_pointer_cast;
00042 
00044   struct RuntimeError : std::exception
00045   {
00046     explicit RuntimeError(std::string const & msg = std::string())
00047       : m_msg("a runtime error occurred")
00048     {
00049       if(msg.size() > 0) { m_msg += ": " + msg; }
00050     }
00051     virtual char const * what() const throw() { return m_msg.c_str(); }
00052     virtual ~RuntimeError() throw() {}
00053   private:
00054     std::string m_msg;
00055   };
00056 
00057   typedef boost::uint_t<32>::exact uint32;
00058 
00060   enum TagValue { FAIL, CTOR, OPER, CHOICE, FWD, INT, FLOAT };
00061 
00063   inline bool is_ctor(TagValue x)
00064   {
00065     switch(x)
00066     {
00067       case CTOR: case INT: case FLOAT: return true;
00068       default: return false;
00069     }
00070   }
00071 
00073   inline bool is_builtin(TagValue x)
00074   {
00075     switch(x)
00076     {
00077       case INT: case FLOAT: return true;
00078       default: return false;
00079     }
00080   }
00081 
00083   namespace meta
00084   {
00090     template<sprite::TagValue C> struct TagValue
00091     {
00092       static sprite::TagValue const value = C;
00093       typedef TagValue<C> type;
00094       typedef sprite::TagValue value_type;
00095       operator sprite::TagValue() const { return value; }
00096     };
00097   
00099     template<sprite::TagValue> struct ValueType;
00100     template<> struct ValueType<INT> { typedef boost::int_t<64>::exact type; };
00101     template<> struct ValueType<FLOAT> { typedef double type; };
00102   }
00103 }
